instructions: Join each group using the Blue Everest page admin's personal profile. After joining, check if you can post AS the Blue Everest page inside the group. For private groups, paste the join_template when asked 'Why do you want to join?'. After joining, fill in the GROUP_JOIN_CHECKLIST for each group.
important: NEVER touch Blueprint Building Group. This campaign is Blue Everest ONLY.
simulation_note: Simulation mode is ON. Join groups but do NOT post content yet.

tasks.instructions: Public group - click Join. No template needed. After joining, check posting rules and whether page posting is allowed.

tasks.join_template: שלום, אנחנו Blue Everest Asset Group, חברת פיתוח נדל"ן שפועלת בפיליפינים עם פרויקטים בפנגלאו, בוהול. אנחנו מחפשים לשתף מידע על השקעות נדל"ן באזור ולהתחבר עם משקיעים ישראלים שמתעניינים בשוק האסייתי.
